claim_text: Agent auxiliary produced a class-behavior shift repeatable across five validation seeds relative to the BPB-selected random primary control.
required_wording: Describe this as no-class recovery or a retained-validation class-behavior shift, not as better biomedical reasoning.
forbidden_wording: The agent learned a better biomedical QA model.

claim_text: Agent auxiliary generally outperformed random or manual search.
required_wording: Say the macro-F1 advantage over the strongest random/manual controls was small and uncertain.

claim_text: Agent auxiliary improved probabilistic reliability or calibration.
required_wording: Say the macro-F1 gain came with worse Brier/ECE calibration diagnostics.

claim_text: Lower language-model validation BPB is a sufficient proxy for PubMedQA downstream behavior.
required_wording: Call BPB an incomplete proxy, especially for macro-F1 and minority-class behavior.

claim_text: Higher PubMedQA macro-F1 proves abstract-grounded biomedical reasoning.
required_wording: Say PubMedQA behavior requires partial-input and shuffled-context audits.
forbidden_wording: The model reads abstracts in a clinically meaningful way.

claim_text: The selected 60 cases support a supervisor-informed illustrative case-audit taxonomy.
required_wording: Call it a supervisor-informed illustrative audit; do not call it independent blinded consensus.

claim_text: SciFact externally validates the autoresearch-trained small causal LM.
required_wording: Call SciFact an external stress test for reference evidence classification behavior.
forbidden_wording: SciFact proves the agent strategy generalizes.

claim_text: The system is clinically useful or ready for decision support.
required_wording: State that this is a biomedical literature QA audit, not clinical decision support.

claim_text: The manual error audit is an independent expert consensus review.
required_wording: Call it a supervisor-informed illustrative case audit unless independent reviewer agreement is obtained.

claim_text: The opened PubMedQA test split provides blind held-out confirmation.
required_wording: Call PubMedQA test a post-freeze audit-only split, not an untouched blind test.
